info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

tags.name: YouTube
tags.description: Scrape YouTube channels, videos, and more

get.description: Get comprehensive channel information including stats and metadata. Can pass channelId, handle, or url.

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: YouTube channel ID. Can pass a channelId, handle or url

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: YouTube channel handle. Can pass a channelId, handle or url

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: YouTube channel URL. Can pass a channelId, handle or url

example.name: The Pat McAfee Show
example.tags: pat mcafee, football, pat mcafee show, the pat mcafee show, pat mcafee podcast, pat mcafee clips, pat mcafee reacts, pat mcafee highlights, pat mcafee live, pat mcafee show live, pat mcafee podcast, nfl, nba, nhl, mlb, ufc, sports

get.description: Get all videos from a channel with detailed information. Can pass channelId or handle.

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: YouTube channel ID

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: YouTube channel handle

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort by latest or popular

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Continuation token to get more videos. Get 'continuationToken' from previous response.

parameters.name: includeExtras
parameters.description: This will get you the like + comment count and the description. To get the full details of the video, use the /v1/youtube/video endpoint. This will slow down the response slightly.

videos.title: Russell Wilson Hopes To Finish Career As A Steeler, Reflects On NFL Career With Pat McAfee
videos.description:
Welcome to The Pat McAfee Show LIVE from Noon-3PM EST Mon-Fri. You can also find us live on ESPN, ESPN+, & TikTok!

Become a #McAfeeMafia member! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxcTeAKWJca6XyJ37_...

get.description: Get the shorts from a channel. If you need more details about the short like description, publish date, etc, you'll need to use the 'Video/Short Details' endpoint.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Can pass channelId or handle

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: Can pass channelId or handle

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort by newest or popular

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Continuation token to get more videos. Get 'continuationToken' from previous response.

shorts.title: My app failed, then I changed one thing, and made $80K
shorts.description: Praneeth quit his $250K/year job to build an app that failed. Then, he changed one thing and made $80K

get.description: Get complete information about a video or short including the transcript! There is a 'transcript' field and a 'transcript_only_text' field.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: YouTube video or short URL

example.title: Inside the NBA: Chuck Trolls Jussie Smollett "Do not commit crimes with checks, use cash!"

watchNextVideos.title: Charles Barkley and Shaq FUNNIEST MOMENTS

get.description: Get transcript of a video or short

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: YouTube video or short URL

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: 2 letter language code, ie 'en', 'es', 'fr' etc. If the transcript is not available in the language you specify, the transcript will be null.

transcript.text: welcome back to the hell farm and the

example.transcript_only_text: welcome back to the hell farm and the backyard trails we built these jumps two years ago and last year we just kind of rebuilt them and this year......

get.description: Search YouTube and get matching videos, channels, playlists, shorts, lives, etc. Video explaining the response format: https://www.tella.tv/video/explaining-youtube-search-results-payload-353a

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query

parameters.name: uploadDate
parameters.description: Upload date

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort by

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter by these options. Note this doesn't work when you use either 'uploadDate' or 'sortBy'. It basically only works when you have a query.

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Continuation token to get more videos. Get 'continuationToken' from previous response.

parameters.name: includeExtras
parameters.description: This will get you the like + comment count and the description. To get the full details of the video, use the /v1/youtube/video endpoint. *This will slow down the response slightly.*

get.description: Search YouTube and get matching videos, channels, and playlists

parameters.name: hashtag
parameters.description: Hashtag to search for

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Continuation token to get more videos. Get 'continuationToken' from previous response.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Search for all types of content or only shorts

get.description: Get comments from a video. Can only get 1k top comments and about 7k new comments.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: YouTube video URL

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Continuation token to get more comments. Get 'continuationToken' from previous response.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order of comments

comments.content: I love how in the middle he said "I've been able to work with 2 great coaches... Pete and Coach Tomlin"... Side shade to Coach Sean Payton, love it :)

get.description: Get about 48 trending shorts. Continue hitting this to get more shorts (get new ones with each call)

shorts.title: That hooper who says their just shoes

get.description: Get the videos of a YouTube playlist

parameters.name: playlist_id
parameters.description: The ID of the YouTube playlist. In the YouTube URL it will be the 'list' parameter.

example.title: Songs with Lyrics 2025 - New Songs 2025 - Music 2025 New Songs

videos.title: Lady Gaga, Bruno Mars - Die With A Smile

get.description: Get the details of a community post

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the YouTube community post to get

example.content:
How to build something meaningful

1. sit down
2. set a timer for 2 hours
3. work
4. do that over and over and over

NOTHING meaningful was built in a day, a week, or even a month

you should launch quickly, but the work can't end there

successful products have YEARS of craft behind them

start building yours today: http://starterstory.com/bsm
